emails.subject: Trans Pecos-can we meet at 11:00?
emails.body: Trans Pecos-can we meet at 11:00? Kevin, Due to Stan's floor meeting at 1:30, are you available at 11:00 to prep for the 3:30 Trans Pecos meeting? Thanks, Kim.

emails.body: Re: Trans Pecos-can we meet at 11:00? Yes. Where? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL> Sent: Mon Jan 07 08:31:37 2002

emails.body: RE: Trans Pecos-can we meet at 11:00? Let's meeting in EB1336. Thanks, Kim. To: Watson, Kimberly
